sections.title: Work in progress
sections.content: This section mirrors the **Payless API** area of the public docs. Extend with official guides approved by your integrations team.

items.title: Credentials
items.text: Obtain endpoints and keys with your Integrations Specialist.

items.title: Authorization flow
items.text: Implement capture and confirmation per product contract.

items.title: Monitoring
items.text: Track webhooks and reconciliation via API reports.

sections.content: See the official **Payless API** documentation for full endpoint lists and payloads.
